key.name: app-blacklist
key.description: List of app names, IDs, or WM classes to hide from the menu bar.

key.name: menu-icon
key.description: Icon for the system menu (position 0). Leave empty to auto-detect from your distro. Select "Apple" to use the Apple logo.

key.name: lock-to-focused-app
key.description: When enabled, the app menu stays locked to the currently focused app even when hovering over the panel. The menu only changes when you switch to a different window or show the desktop.

key.name: show-os-icon
key.description: Show the OS logo icon in the top panel. When hidden, the menu is still accessible but the icon is not displayed.

key.name: show-user-switcher
key.description: Show the user switcher button in the top panel for fast user switching.

key.name: prefer-macos-style
key.description: Use more macOS-like wording and layout in the Apple, app, and Window menus while preserving GNOME-native behavior.

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: Write AppMenu diagnostic logs to the GNOME Shell journal. Keep disabled for normal use.

key.name: show-workspace-indicator
key.description: Show macOS-style workspace dots in the top panel.

key.name: workspace-indicator-position
key.description: Panel side for the workspace indicator. Supported values: left, right.

key.name: search-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut used to open AppMenu Search.
